Creating Other Types of
Prelaunch Content
Module 4
Other Types of Prelaunch Content
• Audio
• (generally not recommended)
• (turn it into screencap and it will raise the
perceived value dramatically)
Other Types of Prelaunch Content
• PDF Report - can be very effective, especially if
combined with video
• Written report
• Process map
• Mind map
• Flow chart
• Infographic
• High perceived value, can be great for
generating opt-ins
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Other Types of Prelaunch Content
• Webinar or Teleseminar - can use it during your
Prelaunch or after you open your cart
• freeconferencecall.com
• instsantteleseminar.com
• gotowebinar.com
Other Types of Prelaunch Content
• Software
• Giving away software as Prelaunch Content can
be very effective
• (but this is one thing I haven’t done… so you’re
on your own) ;-)
Just remember…
• “Horses for courses”
• What you use depends on your situation AND on
your assets
• Video is really great for LOTS of situations… it’s
good to get comfortable with video
• It’s about progress, not perfection
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
